title: Doppelgänger of Dooku
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Character |type=Dark Jedi |image=[[File:DoppelgangerOfDooku-TheNewDroidArmy.png]] |name=Doppelgänger of Dooku |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]] (14:3)''[[Star Wars: The New Droid Army]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height=1.93 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass=80–86 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] |hair=White |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Fair |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]] *[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |masters=[[Dooku/Legends|Darth Tyranus]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You have yet to realize your importance young Skywalker. Today you have ensured the fall of the Republic.|The dopplegänger's last words|}} A '''doppelgänger of Dooku''', seemingly identical to the real [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] although less adept in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], served the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] as one of the real Dooku's [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Once, I thought you could be useful, but you are far too stubborn.''"
"''… You are twisted, Dooku. The Jedi will put an end to your plans.''"
"''Through you, I suppose, Master Skywalker? If you are the Republic's greatest hope, then they have much to fear.|The dopplegänger confronts Anakin Skywalker|}} [[File:Dookuclone.png|thumb|left|200px|The doppelgänger is defeated by Anakin.]] Early in the Clone Wars, the [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|Senate Bureau of Intelligence]] tracked Count Dooku's sporadic appearances across the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. Dooku's elusiveness and omnipresence led many to believe that the Count had [[Cloning/Legends|cloned]] himself.''[[SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story]]'' In reality, Count Dooku was using the [[Dopplegänger]] [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] to manifest short-lived duplicates of himself. Ten months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], a dopplegänger was assigned to guard [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] [[Foreman/Legends|Foreman]] [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor's]] [[C-B3 cortosis battle droid/Legends|C-B3 cortosis battle droid]] factory on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]], and was killed trying to defend it from [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. Later in the war, Dooku had learned that Skywalker had killed another clone of Count Dooku of [[Serenno/Legends|Serenno]], thinking of him as another changeling, another Dooku abandoned by his parents, left to be chopped up by some upstart Jedi butcher in the name of a corrupt Republic.''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' ==Powers and abilities== {{Quote|What's this I sense? Confusion … sorrow. And something more … Pain. Pain over your …''"
"''Stop it now Dooku … or I will finish you!''"
"''If only you had released your anger then … you might have been able to save her.|The dopplegänger senses Skywalker's emotions|}} This doppelgänger was skilled in [[Form II/Legends|Form II]] [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]], just as the real Dooku had been, and he attacked Anakin Skywalker with small, concentrated bursts of [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]]. Additionally, he had adopted the psychological warfare tactic known as [[Dun Möch/Legends|Dun Möch]], which he employed against Skywalker, only to result in backfiring on him. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|Explaining away the Dooku that Anakin defeats in ''New Droid Army'' as a doppleganger in the Fact Files card, we explain how Anakin could win against the Sith lord in such a confrontation (the doppleganger is only half as strong as the original), how Dooku could "die" and "disappear" as he does in the game, and maybe most importantly, how this confrontation wasn't in a sense actual—an out-of-universe climactic problem that still plagues the pre-''Empire Strikes Back'' Luke/Vader confrontation in ''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' to this day.|Abel G. Peña|{{WebCite|url=http://www.myuselessknowledge.com/swfa/Ret-Con.html|text=SWFA: The Anatomy of a Ret-Con|author=Peña, Abel G.|archivedate=20190812065735}}}} [[Abel G. Peña]] has stated that the doppelgänger was not a clone, but was created using the Force, believing that clones have been overused as an explanation for inconsistent deaths. ==Appearances== *''[[SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars: The New Droid Army]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 116|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 116]] *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Dark Acolytes}} {{Interlang |es=Doble de Dooku |sv=Dookus Dubbelgångare }} [[Category:Dark Acolytes]] [[Category:Dark Jedi]] [[Category:Human clones]] [[Category:Impersonators]] [[Category:Males]]
